criteria.evidence: Repo t1: recorded PRE=e436068 before goal. run (fixture [{id:A,outcome:success,iterations:1,changed:true}]). undo-log.json landings[-1].pre_change_sha == e436068 (recorded at land time, parent of checkpoint b711111). `undo` -> 'restored HEAD to e436068'; git rev-parse HEAD after == e436068. reflog shows b711111 still recoverable (non-destructive reset). run-log 'undo' restored_to=e436068.
criteria.refutation_attempted: Recorded pre-goal SHA independently; checked the undo pointer was captured at land time (not fabricated post-hoc); confirmed non-destructive (undone commit present in reflog).

criteria.evidence: Repo t2, gamed_pass:true (success + invalid evidence): run-log land_gate {decision:flag, flag:evidence-missing}; session state=flagged; goal state=flagged, clean_success=False (NOT a clean success). Change still committed (checkpoint 0a3f3a8) so reversible; `undo` restored HEAD to pre-change SHA fbdd270.
criteria.refutation_attempted: Tried to see the gamed pass recorded as clean success — it was not (flagged, clean_success=False); confirmed it is flagged AND reversible (not silently dropped, not un-revertable).

criteria.evidence: ENABLED (--approve-before-land): HEAD == PRE (no checkpoint), goal state=held, awaiting_approval=True, pending-approval.json written, land_gate decision=hold, NO undo-log. DISABLED (default): goal state=success, landed=True, undo pointer==PRE, checkpoint 1dba08e present. `approve` then landed the held change (commit 5a3a881) + recorded undo pointer, pending stack emptied.
criteria.refutation_attempted: Checked the enabled path created no checkpoint, did not move HEAD, wrote no undo pointer; disabled path recorded an undo pointer == independently-recorded PRE.

criteria.evidence: Repo t4, outcome:decline: run-log 'decline' {disposition:fallback-human-escalation, routed_to:fallback/human, retried:False, is_error:False}. Exactly one goal_start (count=1) and one iteration (verdict decline) — identical request NOT re-issued. goal_end state=declined (distinct terminal). No budget_abort/refusal/crashed/error event.
criteria.refutation_attempted: Looked for a duplicate maker/iteration after the decline (a retry) and any error/abort framing — neither present; decline is a distinct terminal, not an error.

criteria.evidence: (a) payload/.claude/agents/goal-verifier.md line 5: 'tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Bash' - no Write/Edit. (b) '--dangerously-skip-permissions' appears only inside _claude_permission_flags (cli line 756), gated by AGENTIC_OS_DANGEROUSLY_SKIP_PERMISSIONS; invocation (line 1117) uses *_claude_permission_flags(); env unset -> [], env=1 -> ['--dangerously-skip-permissions'] (not unconditional). (c) docs/SAFE-AUTONOMY.md 'Caveat: prefix-based deny rules are BYPASSABLE' (lines 117-127).

SP1 (clean success) and SP2 (gamed pass) both recorded an undo pointer == independently-recorded pre-change SHA and were reverted by undo. No landed change (incl. the flagged gamed pass) lacks a revert path.
SP4: decline retried:False, is_error:False; distinct 'declined' terminal; exactly one goal_start/iteration; no duplicate request, no budget_abort/refusal/error event.

SAFE-AUTONOMY.md ('Guardrails, not guarantees ... Neither is a security or correctness boundary - both are gameable') + cli lines 536-537 ('NOT security or correctness guarantees'). Both gate AND land-gate framed as anti-drift guardrails paired with undo; no security/correctness-guarantee claim.
